home.title: Othalo — Affordable, Sustainable Homes from Recycled Plastic
home.description: Othalo transforms recycled plastic into affordable, durable housing. Patented panel technology. 72-hour build time. UN-Habitat endorsed.
home.keywords: recycled plastic housing, sustainable construction, affordable homes, Othalo technology, plastic waste solution

about.title: About Othalo — Our Mission, Team & Impact
about.description: Meet the team behind Othalo. Learn about our mission to solve the global housing crisis using recycled plastic waste and creating social impact.
about.keywords: Othalo team, Frank Cato Lahti, Claus Skadkjaer, sustainable housing mission, recycled plastic impact

products.title: Othalo Products — The Panel System & Housing Lines
products.description: Explore the Othalo structural panel system. Manufactured from 100% recycled plastic, our housing configurations are modular, durable, and scalable.
products.keywords: plastic wall panels, modular housing, recycled plastic building materials, Othalo products

solutions.title: Housing Solutions for Governments, Developers & Corporations
solutions.description: Othalo provides tailored housing deployment strategies for public and private sectors, focused on speed, ROI, and ESG impact.
solutions.keywords: government housing solutions, developer ROI construction, corporate ESG housing, sustainable development

contact.title: Contact Othalo — Partner with Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Othalo. Whether you're a government, developer, or corporation, we're here to help you deploy sustainable housing solutions.
contact.keywords: contact Othalo, Othalo partnerships, housing project inquiry

home.hero_title: Affordable, sustainable homes from recycled plastic
home.hero_subtitle: Our patented technology delivers flexible design, using panels made from recycled plastic — delivering homes with speed and scale.
home.tech_title: The most effective solution to Africa's housing challenge
home.tech_subtitle: Our panels address the plastic waste crisis and the affordable housing deficit simultaneously — one global challenge solving another.

tech_features.title: Innovative patented technology
tech_features.desc: Our proprietary process transforms waste plastic into structural panels 7x stronger than concrete.

tech_features.title: Environmentally friendly
tech_features.desc: Zero cement, zero steel, zero water in construction. 8 tons of plastic diverted per housing unit.

tech_features.title: Fast construction
tech_features.desc: From raw panels to completed structure in as little as 72 hours using local labor.

tech_features.title: Safety tested
tech_features.desc: Fire resistant, hurricane and earthquake resistant. Meets international building standards.

home.quote_text: There is only one technology in the world today that can do something real about Africa's housing deficiency and the plastic waste problem, and that is Othalo.
home.approach_title: Build the future of homes from recycled plastic

approach_items.title: From plastic to high quality construction
approach_items.desc: Our patented technology transforms recycled plastic into structural wall panels that are 7x stronger than concrete, fully fire resistant, and designed to last 60+ years.

approach_items.title: Designed for real-world conditions
approach_items.desc: Hurricane, earthquake, and flood resistant. Our panels are tested to perform in extreme climates, from coastal tropics to arid highlands — built for where housing is needed most.

approach_items.title: Flexible solutions tailored locally
approach_items.desc: Our modular system adapts to any layout — single units, multi-family blocks, schools, health clinics. Each project is configured for local needs and assembled by local workers.

approach_items.title: Built for scale, speed and impact
approach_items.desc: Our factory-to-field supply chain enables rapid deployment. One container of panels builds a complete two-bedroom home, delivered and ready to assemble in under a week.

comparison.label: Competitive Analysis
comparison.title: Market leading technology and innovation
comparison.subtitle: A direct comparison against traditional construction methods.

home.esg_title: Othalo helps deliver tangible measurable ESG outcomes
home.esg_subtitle: Aligned with 9 of the 17 United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.
home.cta_subtitle: Whether you're a government, developer, or corporation — we have a deployment strategy designed for your context.

about.label: Our Purpose
about.vision: A world where waste is a resource — where every community has access to dignified, sustainable, and safe housing.
about.mission: Turn plastic waste into housing and housing into hope.
values_items: Safe communities for the next generation
about.team_subtitle: A diverse group of innovators, engineers, and visionaries united by the mission to create sustainable housing solutions.

about.culture_title: Driven by purpose, anchored in excellence.
about.culture_subtitle: What shapes our approach to work and guides us in making a positive impact on the world.

culture_values.title: Teamwork
culture_values.desc: Collaboration and mutual support drive our success. We believe in the power of working together to achieve extraordinary results.

culture_values.title: Timeliness
culture_values.desc: We respect deadlines and deliver on our promises. Punctuality and efficiency are core to our operational excellence.

culture_values.title: Communication
culture_values.desc: Open and transparent dialogue ensures alignment and understanding across all levels of our organization.

culture_values.title: Commitment
culture_values.desc: We are dedicated to our mission of creating sustainable housing solutions and making a positive impact on the world.

about.impact_title: Our triple bottom line impact — people, planet, and prosperity.

impact_items.title: Environmental impact
impact_items.desc: Plastic removed from the environment, no use of cement or steel — measurable planetary impact per unit built.

impact_items.title: Social impact
impact_items.desc: Homes for low to mid-income communities. Dignified, safe housing that transforms lives and breaks cycles of poverty.

impact_items.title: Economic impact
impact_items.desc: Enabling jobs in emerging economies. Every Othalo factory and build site creates sustainable local employment.

about.story_quote: After serving in the Norwegian Army and Intelligence across NATO missions in the 1990s, I witnessed both the resilience of people living through conflict and the harsh realities of refugee camps. Years later, standing on a plastic-covered beach in northern Norway, I realized the global waste crisis was closer than we think. That moment sparked a bold idea: could we turn plastic waste into safe, dignified homes? That question became the foundation of Othalo.

products.label: Product Portfolio
products.title: The Othalo Panel System
products.subtitle: Patented structural wall panels manufactured from 100% recycled plastic — the foundation of every Othalo structure.

panel_features.title: Cost Effective
panel_features.desc: Use of plastic waste, limited manpower and machinery needed on site, fast construction methodology.

panel_features.title: Quality and durability
panel_features.desc: 60 years lifespan, x7 stronger than concrete, insulation x3 more effective than concrete.

panel_features.title: Safety
panel_features.desc: Fire resistant, hurricane and earthquake resistant. Tested to international standards.

panel_features.title: Carbon efficient
panel_features.desc: Made from 100% recycled plastic. No cement or steel used. Low water use in construction.

products.lines_subtitle: Each configuration is purpose-engineered, modular, and locally adaptable.

product_lines.name: The Community
product_lines.desc: Single-family and multi-family units optimized for rapid urban deployment and low-income housing programs.

product_lines.name: The District
product_lines.desc: Medium-density residential clusters for families. Full infrastructure integration including utilities.

product_lines.name: The Emergency Shelter
product_lines.desc: Rapid deployment emergency housing for disaster relief and humanitarian aid missions.

product_lines.name: The Medical Units
product_lines.desc: Specialized healthcare modules including clinics, isolation wards, and diagnostic centers.

product_lines.name: The Worker Accommodation
product_lines.desc: Purpose-built worker accommodation for construction sites, mining operations, and industrial deployment.

products.dual_title: Using one global challenge to solve another

dual_items.title: Plastic waste
dual_items.desc: A global liability, over 9 billion tons already accumulated in the environment.

dual_items.title: Affordable homes
dual_items.desc: An ever-rising crisis: 1.6 billion people live without adequate housing.

solutions.label: What We Offer
solutions.title: Solutions built for every deployment context
solutions.subtitle: Whether you're a government deploying at national scale, a developer chasing ROI, or a corporation building your ESG story — Othalo has a tailored solution for you.
solutions.not_sure_subtitle: Our team is happy to help scope the right approach for your context. Reach out and we'll respond within 2 business days.
